# c3jepa-wm


<!-- WARNING: THIS FILE WAS AUTOGENERATED! DO NOT EDIT! -->

This file will become your README and also the index of your
documentation.

## Developer Guide

If you are new to using `nbdev` here are some useful pointers to get you
started.

### Install c3jepa_wm in Development mode

``` sh
# make sure c3jepa_wm package is installed in development mode
$ pip install -e .

# make changes under nbs/ directory
# ...

# compile to have changes apply to c3jepa_wm
$ nbdev_prepare
```

## Usage

### Installation

Install latest from the GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/c3jepa-wm):

``` sh
$ pip install git+https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/c3jepa-wm.git
```

or from [conda](https://anaconda.org/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/c3jepa-wm)

``` sh
$ conda install -c Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh c3jepa_wm
```

or from [pypi](https://pypi.org/project/c3jepa-wm/)

``` sh
$ pip install c3jepa_wm
```

### Documentation

Documentation can be found hosted on this GitHub
[repository](https://github.com/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/c3jepa-wm)’s
[pages](https://Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh.github.io/c3jepa-wm/). Additionally
you can find package manager specific guidelines on
[conda](https://anaconda.org/Ahmed-Khaled-Saleh/c3jepa-wm) and
[pypi](https://pypi.org/project/c3jepa-wm/) respectively.
